seoTitle: Clearfield vs Clemton Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clearfield and Clemton Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clearfield vs Clemton Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clearfield and Clemton Park.
heading: Clearfield vs Clemton Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clearfield, New South Wales and Clemton Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clearfield has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Clemton Park (52/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clearfield or Clemton Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clearfield has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Clemton Park scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clearfield scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Clemton Park scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clearfield or Clemton Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clearfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
